description_long: This bollard is a tall, slender, rectangular column with a flat square top and a matching square base. The structure appears to be made of a dark, solid material, likely metal or concrete, giving it a robust and industrial appearance. The surfaces are smooth and matte, with subtle textural variations visible in the material. The top and base are slightly wider than the central shaft, providing stability and a clean, geometric silhouette. There are no visible markings, chains, or connectors, and the design is minimalist with no decorative elements. This bollard is suitable for use in urban environments to control access or delineate pedestrian and vehicular zones.
description: A tall, dark, rectangular bollard with a flat square top and base, featuring a minimalist and robust design. The surface is smooth and matte, with no visible markings or connectors.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full height and rectangular profile, with the flat square top and base clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view is nearly identical to the front, highlighting the uniform width and smooth surface of the shaft.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, with the same flat top and base, and no additional features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the consistent rectangular shape and minimalist design.
